body: Hi {business_name} - this is William from SW Florida Comfort HVAC (239-398-5676). Your AC works hard in Florida heat. We offer free HVAC inspection to prevent breakdowns. Interested? Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: HVAC-specific template for SW Florida Comfort HVAC - focuses on maintenance/prevention
value_proposition: Free HVAC inspection to prevent costly breakdowns during Florida summer

variants.body: Hi {business_name} owner - William from SW Florida Comfort HVAC. Your customers leave if AC breaks in summer. We prevent that with free maintenance check. (239) 398-5676. Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
